lessons.notes: Build secure foundations in Online Safety as part of the progression towards GCSE Computer Science, using the unit 'Unit 1: Digital Safety' to develop vocabulary, confidence and practical application.
objectives: Students will be able to know how to stay safe online and use kind language.
successCriteria: I can explain the main idea of Know how to stay safe online and use kind language; I can complete a guided practice task; I can describe how this learning connects to Online Safety.
misconceptions: Students may think online safety only means passwords rather than behaviour, privacy and reporting concerns.
